```{r}
covars_Eu_anc_NS <- 'seq_batch + AC_attended + sex_1male + standardised_age + standardised_age_squared + sex_standardised_age + sex_standardised_age_squared + synonymous_AC5orless_exome_wide_total + AAC + EAS + LAT + SAS + EU_PC1 + EU_PC2 + EU_PC3 + EU_PC4 + EU_PC5 + EU_PC6 + EU_PC7 + EU_PC8 + EU_PC9 + EU_PC10' # SSA removed here as no one defined as EUR anc has a non-zero SSA probability. 
covars_Eu_anc_syn <- 'seq_batch + AC_attended + sex_1male + standardised_age + standardised_age_squared + sex_standardised_age + sex_standardised_age_squared + AAC + EAS + LAT + SAS + EU_PC1 + EU_PC2 + EU_PC3 + EU_PC4 + EU_PC5 + EU_PC6 + EU_PC7 + EU_PC8 + EU_PC9 + EU_PC10'
results <- data.frame(
  gene_set=character(),
  dep_var = character(),
  indep_var = character(),
  allele_count = numeric(),
  beta = numeric(),
  SE = numeric(),
  lower_CI = numeric(),
  upper_CI = numeric(),
  p_value = numeric(),
  n_vars = integer(),
  n_people = integer(),
  ancestry=character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE)


# REGRESS
# Non-synonymous vars 
sets <- list('pLI_0.9','non_constrained_pLI_lessthan0.9',
             'brain_expressed','non_brain_expressed',
             'SZ_GWAS_all', 'SZ_GWAS_closest', 'SZ_GWAS_credible_causal_US',
             'NDD_CNVs_US', 'SZ_CNVs_US',
             'SCHEMA_FDR_US')
var_types<-list('mid_REVEL50to75_Miss', 'benign_REVEL50_Miss')
dependent_var<-list('g_MAIN_RT_TMTB_NM_PM_zscore_outliersrm')

# Loop through each phenotype
for (dep_var in dependent_var) {
  # Loop through each independent variable type
  for (var in var_types) {
    # Loop through each set
    for (set in sets) {
      independent_var <- paste0(var, '_AC', AC, '_', set, '_total')
      formula <- as.formula(paste(dep_var, "~", independent_var, "+", covars_Eu_anc_NS))
      model <- lm(formula, data = EU_ancs) 
      tidy_model <- tidy(model)

      # Extract outputs I need
      if (nrow(tidy_model) > 0) {
        beta <- tidy_model$estimate[2]
        SE <- tidy_model$std.error[2]
        conf_int <- confint(model)[2, ] 
        p_value <- tidy_model$p.value[2]
        with_phen=subset(EU_ancs, !is.na(EU_ancs[[dep_var]]))
        n_people<-nrow(with_phen)
        n_vars <- sum(with_phen[[independent_var]])
        anc_set<-'EUR_only'
        # Add to results data frame
        results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
          gene_set = set,
          dep_var = dep_var,
          indep_var = independent_var,
          allele_count = AC,
          beta = beta,
          SE = SE,
          lower_CI = conf_int[1],
          upper_CI = conf_int[2],
          p_value = p_value,
          n_vars = n_vars,
          n_people = n_people,
          ancestry = anc_set,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    }
  }
}
# Write out results 
write.csv(results, 'results_g_regressions_AC5orless_lessdelmiss_diagnosesrm_incSE_Eurancs.csv')
system('dx upload results_g_regressions_AC5orless_lessdelmiss_diagnosesrm_incSE_Eurancs.csv --destination ./Variant_counts/Gene_sets/')
```

### AC6to10
```{r}
# Gene set counts
AC='6to10'
system('dx download ./Variant_counts/Gene_sets/*_AC6to10_*.csv --overwrite')
file_list <- list.files(path = "./", pattern = "*_AC6to10_counts.csv", full.names = TRUE)
counts <- lapply(file_list, function(file) {
  data <- fread(file)  # Read the file
  data[, V1 := NULL]  # Drop the first column (V1)
  return(data)
}) %>%
reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Sample_ID", all = TRUE))  # Merge the data frames
all_ancs=merge(phen, counts, by.x='eid', by.y='Sample_ID') 
EU_ancs=subset(all_ancs, all_ancs$EUR>0.8) 

# SET UP
covars_Eu_anc_NS <- 'seq_batch + AC_attended + sex_1male + standardised_age + standardised_age_squared + sex_standardised_age + sex_standardised_age_squared + synonymous_AC6to10_exome_wide_total + AAC + EAS + LAT + SAS + EU_PC1 + EU_PC2 + EU_PC3 + EU_PC4 + EU_PC5 + EU_PC6 + EU_PC7 + EU_PC8 + EU_PC9 + EU_PC10' # SSA removed here as no one defined as EUR anc has a non-zero SSA probability. 
covars_Eu_anc_syn <- 'seq_batch + AC_attended + sex_1male + standardised_age + standardised_age_squared + sex_standardised_age + sex_standardised_age_squared + AAC + EAS + LAT + SAS + EU_PC1 + EU_PC2 + EU_PC3 + EU_PC4 + EU_PC5 + EU_PC6 + EU_PC7 + EU_PC8 + EU_PC9 + EU_PC10'
results <- data.frame(
  gene_set=character(),
  dep_var = character(),
  indep_var = character(),
  allele_count = numeric(),
  beta = numeric(),
  SE = numeric(),
  lower_CI = numeric(),
  upper_CI = numeric(),
  p_value = numeric(),
  n_vars = integer(),
  n_people = integer(),
  ancestry=character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE)


# REGRESS
# Non-synonymous vars 
sets <- list('pLI_0.9','non_constrained_pLI_lessthan0.9',
             'brain_expressed','non_brain_expressed',
             'SZ_GWAS_all', 'SZ_GWAS_closest', 'SZ_GWAS_credible_causal_US',
             'NDD_CNVs_US', 'SZ_CNVs_US',
             'SCHEMA_FDR_US')
var_types<-list('PTV', 'REVEL75_Miss')
dependent_var<-list('g_MAIN_RT_TMTB_NM_PM_zscore_outliersrm')

# Loop through each phenotype
for (dep_var in dependent_var) {
  # Loop through each independent variable type
  for (var in var_types) {
    # Loop through each set
    for (set in sets) {
      independent_var <- paste0(var, '_AC', AC, '_', set, '_total')
      formula <- as.formula(paste(dep_var, "~", independent_var, "+", covars_Eu_anc_NS))
      model <- lm(formula, data = EU_ancs) 
      tidy_model <- tidy(model)

      # Extract outputs I need
      if (nrow(tidy_model) > 0) {
        beta <- tidy_model$estimate[2]
        SE <- tidy_model$std.error[2]
        conf_int <- confint(model)[2, ] 
        p_value <- tidy_model$p.value[2]
        with_phen=subset(EU_ancs, !is.na(EU_ancs[[dep_var]]))
        n_people<-nrow(with_phen)
        n_vars <- sum(with_phen[[independent_var]])
        anc_set<-'EUR_only'
        # Add to results data frame
        results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
          gene_set = set,
          dep_var = dep_var,
          indep_var = independent_var,
          allele_count = AC,
          beta = beta,
          SE = SE,
          lower_CI = conf_int[1],
          upper_CI = conf_int[2],
          p_value = p_value,
          n_vars = n_vars,
          n_people = n_people,
          ancestry = anc_set,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    }
  }
}


# Synonymous vars  
var_types<-list('synonymous')
for (dep_var in dependent_var) {
  # Loop through each independent variable type
  for (var in var_types) {
    # Loop through each set
    for (set in sets) {
      independent_var <- paste0(var, '_AC', AC, '_', set, '_total')
      formula <- as.formula(paste(dep_var, "~", independent_var, "+", covars_Eu_anc_syn))
      model <- lm(formula, data = EU_ancs) 
      tidy_model <- tidy(model)

      # Extract outputs I need
      if (nrow(tidy_model) > 0) {
        beta <- tidy_model$estimate[2]
        SE <- tidy_model$std.error[2]
        conf_int <- confint(model)[2, ] 
        p_value <- tidy_model$p.value[2]
        with_phen=subset(EU_ancs, !is.na(EU_ancs[[dep_var]]))
        n_people<-nrow(with_phen)
        n_vars <- sum(with_phen[[independent_var]])
        anc_set<-'EUR_only'
        # Add to results data frame
        results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
          gene_set = set,
          dep_var = dep_var,
          indep_var = independent_var,
          allele_count = AC,
          beta = beta,
          SE = SE,
          lower_CI = conf_int[1],
          upper_CI = conf_int[2],
          p_value = p_value,
          n_vars = n_vars,
          n_people = n_people,
          ancestry = anc_set,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    }
  }
}

# Write out results 
write.csv(results, 'results_g_regressions_AC6to10_diagnosesrm_incSE_Eurancs.csv')
system('dx upload results_g_regressions_AC6to10_diagnosesrm_incSE_Eurancs.csv --destination ./Variant_counts/Gene_sets/')
```






### AC11to20
```{r}
# Gene set counts
AC='11to20'
system('dx download ./Variant_counts/Gene_sets/*_AC11to20_*.csv --overwrite')
file_list <- list.files(path = "./", pattern = "*_AC11to20_counts.csv", full.names = TRUE)
counts <- lapply(file_list, function(file) {
  data <- fread(file)  # Read the file
  data[, V1 := NULL]  # Drop the first column (V1)
  return(data)
}) %>%
reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Sample_ID", all = TRUE))  # Merge the data frames
all_ancs=merge(phen, counts, by.x='eid', by.y='Sample_ID') 
EU_ancs=subset(all_ancs, all_ancs$EUR>0.8) 

# SET UP
covars_Eu_anc_NS <- 'seq_batch + AC_attended + sex_1male + standardised_age + standardised_age_squared + sex_standardised_age + sex_standardised_age_squared + synonymous_AC11to20_exome_wide_total + AAC + EAS + LAT + SAS + EU_PC1 + EU_PC2 + EU_PC3 + EU_PC4 + EU_PC5 + EU_PC6 + EU_PC7 + EU_PC8 + EU_PC9 + EU_PC10' # SSA removed here as no one defined as EUR anc has a non-zero SSA probability. 
covars_Eu_anc_syn <- 'seq_batch + AC_attended + sex_1male + standardised_age + standardised_age_squared + sex_standardised_age + sex_standardised_age_squared + AAC + EAS + LAT + SAS + EU_PC1 + EU_PC2 + EU_PC3 + EU_PC4 + EU_PC5 + EU_PC6 + EU_PC7 + EU_PC8 + EU_PC9 + EU_PC10'
results <- data.frame(
  gene_set=character(),
  dep_var = character(),
  indep_var = character(),
  allele_count = numeric(),
  beta = numeric(),
  SE = numeric(),
  lower_CI = numeric(),
  upper_CI = numeric(),
  p_value = numeric(),
  n_vars = integer(),
  n_people = integer(),
  ancestry=character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE)


# REGRESS
# Non-synonymous vars 
sets <- list('pLI_0.9','non_constrained_pLI_lessthan0.9',
             'brain_expressed','non_brain_expressed',
             'SZ_GWAS_all', 'SZ_GWAS_closest', 'SZ_GWAS_credible_causal_US',
             'NDD_CNVs_US', 'SZ_CNVs_US',
             'SCHEMA_FDR_US')
var_types<-list('PTV', 'REVEL75_Miss')
dependent_var<-list('g_MAIN_RT_TMTB_NM_PM_zscore_outliersrm')

# Loop through each phenotype
for (dep_var in dependent_var) {
  # Loop through each independent variable type
  for (var in var_types) {
    # Loop through each set
    for (set in sets) {
      independent_var <- paste0(var, '_AC', AC, '_', set, '_total')
      formula <- as.formula(paste(dep_var, "~", independent_var, "+", covars_Eu_anc_NS))
      model <- lm(formula, data = EU_ancs) 
      tidy_model <- tidy(model)

      # Extract outputs I need
      if (nrow(tidy_model) > 0) {
        beta <- tidy_model$estimate[2]
        SE <- tidy_model$std.error[2]
        conf_int <- confint(model)[2, ] 
        p_value <- tidy_model$p.value[2]
        with_phen=subset(EU_ancs, !is.na(EU_ancs[[dep_var]]))
        n_people<-nrow(with_phen)
        n_vars <- sum(with_phen[[independent_var]])
        anc_set<-'EUR_only'
        # Add to results data frame
        results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
          gene_set = set,
          dep_var = dep_var,
          indep_var = independent_var,
          allele_count = AC,
          beta = beta,
          SE = SE,
          lower_CI = conf_int[1],
          upper_CI = conf_int[2],
          p_value = p_value,
          n_vars = n_vars,
          n_people = n_people,
          ancestry = anc_set,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    }
  }
}


# Synonymous vars  
var_types<-list('synonymous')
for (dep_var in dependent_var) {
  # Loop through each independent variable type
  for (var in var_types) {
    # Loop through each set
    for (set in sets) {
      independent_var <- paste0(var, '_AC', AC, '_', set, '_total')
      formula <- as.formula(paste(dep_var, "~", independent_var, "+", covars_Eu_anc_syn))
      model <- lm(formula, data = EU_ancs) 
      tidy_model <- tidy(model)

      # Extract outputs I need
      if (nrow(tidy_model) > 0) {
        beta <- tidy_model$estimate[2]
        SE <- tidy_model$std.error[2]
        conf_int <- confint(model)[2, ] 
        p_value <- tidy_model$p.value[2]
        with_phen=subset(EU_ancs, !is.na(EU_ancs[[dep_var]]))
        n_people<-nrow(with_phen)
        n_vars <- sum(with_phen[[independent_var]])
        anc_set<-'EUR_only'
        # Add to results data frame
        results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
          gene_set = set,
          dep_var = dep_var,
          indep_var = independent_var,
          allele_count = AC,
          beta = beta,
          SE = SE,
          lower_CI = conf_int[1],
          upper_CI = conf_int[2],
          p_value = p_value,
          n_vars = n_vars,
          n_people = n_people,
          ancestry = anc_set,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    }
  }
}

# Write out results 
write.csv(results, 'results_g_regressions_AC11to20_diagnosesrm_incSE_Eurancs.csv')
system('dx upload results_g_regressions_AC11to20_diagnosesrm_incSE_Eurancs.csv --destination ./Variant_counts/Gene_sets/')
```






### AC21to50
```{r}
# Gene set counts
AC='21to50'
system('dx download ./Variant_counts/Gene_sets/*_AC21to50_*.csv --overwrite')
file_list <- list.files(path = "./", pattern = "*_AC21to50_counts.csv", full.names = TRUE)
counts <- lapply(file_list, function(file) {
  data <- fread(file)  # Read the file
  data[, V1 := NULL]  # Drop the first column (V1)
  return(data)
}) %>%
reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "Sample_ID", all = TRUE))  # Merge the data frames
all_ancs=merge(phen, counts, by.x='eid', by.y='Sample_ID') 
EU_ancs=subset(all_ancs, all_ancs$EUR>0.8) 

# SET UP
covars_Eu_anc_NS <- 'seq_batch + AC_attended + sex_1male + standardised_age + standardised_age_squared + sex_standardised_age + sex_standardised_age_squared + synonymous_AC21to50_exome_wide_total + AAC + EAS + LAT + SAS + EU_PC1 + EU_PC2 + EU_PC3 + EU_PC4 + EU_PC5 + EU_PC6 + EU_PC7 + EU_PC8 + EU_PC9 + EU_PC10' # SSA removed here as no one defined as EUR anc has a non-zero SSA probability. 
covars_Eu_anc_syn <- 'seq_batch + AC_attended + sex_1male + standardised_age + standardised_age_squared + sex_standardised_age + sex_standardised_age_squared + AAC + EAS + LAT + SAS + EU_PC1 + EU_PC2 + EU_PC3 + EU_PC4 + EU_PC5 + EU_PC6 + EU_PC7 + EU_PC8 + EU_PC9 + EU_PC10'
results <- data.frame(
  gene_set=character(),
  dep_var = character(),
  indep_var = character(),
  allele_count = numeric(),
  beta = numeric(),
  SE = numeric(),
  lower_CI = numeric(),
  upper_CI = numeric(),
  p_value = numeric(),
  n_vars = integer(),
  n_people = integer(),
  ancestry=character(),
  stringsAsFactors = FALSE)


# REGRESS
# Non-synonymous vars 
sets <- list('pLI_0.9','non_constrained_pLI_lessthan0.9',
             'brain_expressed','non_brain_expressed',
             'SZ_GWAS_all', 'SZ_GWAS_closest', 'SZ_GWAS_credible_causal_US',
             'NDD_CNVs_US', 'SZ_CNVs_US',
             'SCHEMA_FDR_US')
var_types<-list('PTV', 'REVEL75_Miss')
dependent_var<-list('g_MAIN_RT_TMTB_NM_PM_zscore_outliersrm')

# Loop through each phenotype
for (dep_var in dependent_var) {
  # Loop through each independent variable type
  for (var in var_types) {
    # Loop through each set
    for (set in sets) {
      independent_var <- paste0(var, '_AC', AC, '_', set, '_total')
      formula <- as.formula(paste(dep_var, "~", independent_var, "+", covars_Eu_anc_NS))
      model <- lm(formula, data = EU_ancs) 
      tidy_model <- tidy(model)

      # Extract outputs I need
      if (nrow(tidy_model) > 0) {
        beta <- tidy_model$estimate[2]
        SE <- tidy_model$std.error[2]
        conf_int <- confint(model)[2, ] 
        p_value <- tidy_model$p.value[2]
        with_phen=subset(EU_ancs, !is.na(EU_ancs[[dep_var]]))
        n_people<-nrow(with_phen)
        n_vars <- sum(with_phen[[independent_var]])
        anc_set<-'EUR_only'
        # Add to results data frame
        results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
          gene_set = set,
          dep_var = dep_var,
          indep_var = independent_var,
          allele_count = AC,
          beta = beta,
          SE = SE,
          lower_CI = conf_int[1],
          upper_CI = conf_int[2],
          p_value = p_value,
          n_vars = n_vars,
          n_people = n_people,
          ancestry = anc_set,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    }
  }
}


# Synonymous vars  
var_types<-list('synonymous')
for (dep_var in dependent_var) {
  # Loop through each independent variable type
  for (var in var_types) {
    # Loop through each set
    for (set in sets) {
      independent_var <- paste0(var, '_AC', AC, '_', set, '_total')
      formula <- as.formula(paste(dep_var, "~", independent_var, "+", covars_Eu_anc_syn))
      model <- lm(formula, data = EU_ancs) 
      tidy_model <- tidy(model)

      # Extract outputs I need
      if (nrow(tidy_model) > 0) {
        beta <- tidy_model$estimate[2]
        SE <- tidy_model$std.error[2]
        conf_int <- confint(model)[2, ] 
        p_value <- tidy_model$p.value[2]
        with_phen=subset(EU_ancs, !is.na(EU_ancs[[dep_var]]))
        n_people<-nrow(with_phen)
        n_vars <- sum(with_phen[[independent_var]])
        anc_set<-'EUR_only'
        # Add to results data frame
        results <- rbind(results, data.frame(
          gene_set = set,
          dep_var = dep_var,
          indep_var = independent_var,
          allele_count = AC,
          beta = beta,
          SE = SE,
          lower_CI = conf_int[1],
          upper_CI = conf_int[2],
          p_value = p_value,
          n_vars = n_vars,
          n_people = n_people,
          ancestry = anc_set,
          stringsAsFactors = FALSE
        ))
      }
    }
  }
}

# Write out results 
write.csv(results, 'results_g_regressions_AC21to50_diagnosesrm_incSE_Eurancs.csv')
system('dx upload results_g_regressions_AC21to50_diagnosesrm_incSE_Eurancs.csv --destination ./Variant_counts/Gene_sets/')
```
